face="Noto Serif CJK SC">上一个栈帧</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="110" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-2" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><font style="font-size: 16px;">上一个</font><span style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-size: 16px;">栈帧</span><font style="font-size: 16px;">的 EBP</font></font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="150" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-3" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">局部变量</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="190" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-5" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">callee 的参数列表 n ~ 1</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="230" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-6" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">返回地址</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="270" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-10" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 16px;">caller&nbsp;</span><span style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-size: 16px;">栈帧</span><font style="font-size: 16px;">的 EBP</font></font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="310" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-11" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">局部变量</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="350" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-12" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">下一个函数的参数列表 n ~ 1</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="390" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-13" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">返回地址</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="430" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-14" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC">下一个栈帧</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="470" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-15" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="310" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-16" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">调用函数（caller）的栈帧</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="190" width="150" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-17" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="470" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="310" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-18" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">被调用函数（callee）的栈帧</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="350" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-21" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" target="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="700" y="110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="660" y="160" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-22" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">高地址，栈底</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="80" width="140" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-23" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="700" y="509" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="509" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-24" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">低地址，栈顶</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="480" width="140" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-25" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="700" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-26" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">caller 的 EBP</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="120" width="140" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-28" value="" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="310" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCzxrPARdAbCpb_C6Xvv-29" value="<font face="Noto Serif CJK SC" style="font-size: 16px;">callee 的 EBP</font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="280" width="140" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
